meta.title: Economic and Security Implications of the Russia-Ukraine War: Perspectives from the Czech Presidency
meta.description: Hudson Institute hosted Czech Minister of Finance Zbyněk Stanjura for a speech focused on the economic and security implications of Russian aggression against Ukraine. Currently performing duties for the presidency of the Council of the European Union, Minister Stanjura provides his perspectives from Prague.
